title: Dee's Extended Equipment
description: Adds a variety of new weapons, tools, armor, and more through CIT
body:
![The title logo for Extended Equipment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb651addd76340a9db28a70e5e817ab4c5084a85.png)

## 🛠️ Introduction
**This resource pack requires Optifine, CIT Resewn, or any other mod which adds support for Custom Item Textures. Alternatively, all models also have an associated CustomModelData value too for Vanilla use.**

This resource pack adds a variety of new weapons, tools, armor, and more through the use of CIT to make your roster of equipment (visually) more diversified. Tired of the same old weapons, tools, and armor? This pack adds over 80 new unique textures for different weapons and tools (nearly all of which apply to each material), 9 new types of armor (as well as invisible armor) that can be easily accessed by renaming items!

## ⚙️ Available CIT
<details>
<summary>Click to expand!</summary>

Renaming certain items to any of the following names (not case sensitive) will turn them into the desired items. For a full list (including pictures) of what items can be turned into what, [click here!](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1A7Hqlco571P2YZkqhwiUGkMjvyuyAAweyGy1ShLOWYw/edit#slide=id.p)

## ❔ Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: Can I use this in my modpack/server?**  
A: Yes! Feel free to use this resource pack in any of your projects, however you must credit me and cannot pass my work off as your own.

**Q: What versions does this pack work on?**  
A: With the recent update to Minecraft 1.21 and components, this pack currently only works on versions 1.21.x and newer. However, all versions before and including v1.4 will work on any versions from 1.14.x to 1.19.x!

**Q: Do you take recommendations?**  
A: Sometimes! I'll usually add ideas requested by others if its distinct enough from any other items in the pack to warrant adding it.

**Q: Will there be a Bedrock port?**  
A: To put it bluntly, no. I don't have any plans of making any kind of Bedrock port mostly because there's no easy way to port a pack like this (a CIT-driven one) to Bedrock.

## 💖 Additional Credits
The crown textures in this pack were derived from the Vanilla Tweaks golden crown pack which can be found on [the Vanilla Tweaks resource pack picker](https://www.vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/).
